finding: Credential presence is not deployment readiness. Readiness requires an active token and account-scoped authorization to enumerate Cloudflare Pages projects.

verification.method: isolated Node test run using byte-identical pre-commit source
cases: active token and Pages enumeration accepted
rejected token stops before account request
active token without Pages permission classified separately
malformed account configuration rejected before network access

limits: No Cloudflare credentials were available to execute the live probe.
A successful capability probe does not prove a deployment occurred.
Project enumeration does not prove the expected project or hostname exists.
Served commit identity still requires post-deployment verification.
falsification_route: Run the probe in the protected cloudflare-research GitHub Environment. Any token rejection, permission denial, account mismatch, or inability to list Pages projects falsifies credential readiness.
